headline: FDA Pilot Approval of on! PLUS Nicotine Pouches Could Be A Game Changer For Altria Group (MO)
summary: In March 2026, Helix Innovations LLC, an Altria operating company, completed the national retail rollout of its FDA-authorized on! PLUS nicotine pouches, featuring three flavors, two nicotine strengths, and NICOSLIK technology alongside a built-in disposal compartment. The on! PLUS authorization under the FDA’s pilot program highlights Altria’s push into regulated, smoke-free oral nicotine products that may reshape its product mix within the US market. We’ll now consider how the FDA pilot...

headline: Stock Market Crash Likely Won’t Hurt 5 Safe High-Yielding Dividend Kings
summary: Companies that have raised dividends for shareholders for 50 years or more are the kinds of investments passive income investors need to own. Dependability is crucial for individuals seeking to increase their annual income through dividend stock investments. The Dividend Kings are the 57 companies that have raised their dividends for at least 50 years, ... Stock Market Crash Likely Won’t Hurt 5 Safe High-Yielding Dividend Kings
